## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
--> To set up the code necessary to run the NeuralDepthModel for global scale computation


## To-do
<!---  list of proposed tasks in the PR, move to "Content" on completion 
- Proposed task
--> handle Flux 0.14-0.15 update bug and/or use more efficient NeuralSnowModel, and update ClimaLand Utilities to be able to work with these variables in-bulk


## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->

title: Integrating NeuralDepthModel for global runs
